zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Moreton於1450年出生在英國英格蘭爾莫雷頓 霍爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Maston Moreton25歲，母親Margaret Woodnoth21歲。他和Joanna Webbe至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1507年在英國英格蘭梅瑟希德莫雷頓享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: Moreton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from a double diminutive of   More   2 ‘Moor’. Compare   Moret  .

variants.name: Morton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of the many places called Mor(e)ton, named with Old English mōr ‘moor’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with Morten , and perhaps also with Murton . This English name has also been established in Ireland since the 13th century.
American shortened and altered form of Swedish Mårtensson or Mortensson (see Martenson and Mortenson ), which could also be substituted for the Finnish cognate Marttinen.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Moreton was born in 1450, in Moreton Hall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Maston Moreton, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Woodnoth, was 21. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Joanna Webbe. He died in 1507, in Moreton, Merseyside, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Moreton est né en 1450, à Moreton Hall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Maston Moreton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Woodnoth, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Joanna Webbe. Il est décédé en 1507, à Moreton, Merseyside, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Moretonが1450年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアモーエトン ハルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Maston Moretonは25歳，母Margaret Woodnothは21歳であった。彼はJoanna Webbeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1507年にイギリスイギリスメルセイシドモーエトンで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Moreton(이)가 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모레턴 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Maston Moreton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Woodnoth(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Joanna Webbe(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1507년 영국 잉글랜드 머세이시드 모레턴에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Moreton родился в 1450 г. в местности моретон холл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Maston Moreton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Woodnoth, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Joanna Webbe. Он умер в 1507 г. в местности моретон, мирсисид, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.
